name: accounting firms processing 10–50 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 clients/month, manual tax preparation causes late filings. We automate tax compliance instead of manual tax preparation and filing processes.
problem_solved: Timely tax compliance and filing for multiple clients.
features: data collection forms for client information
